principles: Respect MACI separation of powers: proposer != validator != executor.
Prefer deterministic evals and code-based graders before broader implementation.
Use repo-local scripts and Make targets before inventing ad hoc commands.
Treat the constitutional hash as a runtime and documentation invariant.
notes: This repo already has Claude Code and Codex configuration; Gemini is added as a repo-local workspace layer.
Create .gemini/settings.local.json for personal overrides; it is gitignored.
